message:
test(fcp-host): expand admin_state, doctor, and agent_api via parallel subagents

admin_state.rs: 171 → 250 (+79 tests) — config diff edge cases, json pointer
escaping, drift status combos, state enum roundtrips, sanitize/redact paths.

doctor.rs: 161 → 247 (+86 tests) — classify_self_check keyword branches,
repair hints, freshness levels, serde roundtrips, DoctorService error paths.

agent_api.rs: 158 → 240 (+82 tests) — MCP error codes, session lifecycle,
method routing, content blocks, tool call results, client capabilities.

fcp-host total: 3090 pass, 0 fail, lib clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
